## Summary

<!-- Explain the user-facing problem and the change. -->

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Tests added or updated where behavior changed

## Public-release and safety check

- [ ] No credential, `.env` value, customer data, internal path, or real architecture material is included
- [ ] Any AI behavior remains evidence-backed, human-reviewable, and unable to publish directly
- [ ] Documentation and data-contract notes are updated if needed
